label.title: Workflow Tasks Cleaner
label.description: Manage and clean workflow tasks in the system.
label.cleanDescription: Delete all exited and completed workflow tasks, and clean ghost workflows.
label.workflowListDescription: List all current workflow instances in the system.
label.error: An error occurred. Check server logs for details.

scheduler.description: Configure the automatic scheduled cleanup job. Changes require a module restart to take effect.
scheduler.cronExpressionTooltip: Quartz cron expression defining when the scheduled cleanup runs. Example: "0 30 2 * * ?" runs every day at 02:30.
scheduler.restartHint: Schedule changes require a module restart to take effect.
